edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rogar Baratheon PARENT_OF Boremund Baratheon

edges.quote: reading her the stories that her own mother had once read
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jaehaerys I Targaryen PARENT_OF Daenerys Targaryen

edges.quote: the merry laughter of her own daughter
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alysanne Targaryen PARENT_OF Daenerys Targaryen

edges.quote: his son Simon played the high harp
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lord Dondarrion PARENT_OF Simon Dondarrion

edges.quote: to their mother's side as quickly as possible
